meaning: adj.[解]髋部的,坐骨的,坐骨神经的
examples: Don't sit on your wallet, as that can irritate the sciatic nerve.
Also, don't sit on your wallet, as that can irritate the sciatic nerve.
Q.The way you were sort of flexing your legs, is it sort of a sciatic nerve?
"Nobody knows if it's a muscle with pressure on the sciatic nerve or if there's a problem with a disk, " Stricker said ot the discomfort he felt during his long day.
They began with dead frogs, whose sciatic nerves had been stimulated to make their legs twitch by no less a scientist than Luigi Galvani, the first to look into the matter, in 1771.
